summary.zh: 让城市数据拥有气候与呼吸。
summary.en: Giving urban data its own climate and breath.

description.zh: 实时公共数据驱动光、雾与声音。作品不复刻天气，而是让基础设施的压力、节奏和空白形成另一套感知系统。
description.en: Live public data drives light, haze, and sound. Instead of reproducing weather, the work gives infrastructural stress, rhythm, and absence their own sensory system.

role.zh: 概念、数据系统、声音交互

outcome.zh: 三城巡展，获亚洲设计年度提名
outcome.en: Touring installation across three cities, Asia Design Award nominee
